actions.name: filterData
actions.update: Create a new derived dataset ID

actions.name: createDensityData
actions.update: Create a new derived dataset ID

actions.name: createRegressionData
actions.update: Create a new derived dataset ID

actions.name: createWindowData
actions.update: Create a new derived dataset ID

actions.name: createBin2DData
actions.update: Same logical ID creates and rebinds an immutable derived revision

actions.name: editBin2DData
actions.update: Partially revises one logical owner through an immutable derived revision

actions.name: createIntervalData
actions.update: Create a new derived dataset ID

actions.name: editTextMark
actions.update: Edits typography, alignment, rotation, and offsets

actions.name: layoutLabels
actions.update: Repeated assignment replaces the complete policy; `removeLabelLayout` removes it

actions.name: removeLabelLayout
actions.update: Removes one text mark's graphical label-layout policy

actions.name: editPointMark
actions.update: Edits constant point shape and appearance

actions.name: jitterPoints
actions.update: Same action replaces the target jitter assignment; `removeJitter` removes it

actions.name: removeJitter
actions.update: Removes one target jitter assignment and restores semantic base positions

actions.name: removeMark
actions.update: Removes one stable mark owner and its owned state

actions.name: createRuleMark
actions.update: Endpoint and appearance assignments reauthor the existing rule

actions.name: encodeX
actions.update: Same action replaces a compatible x field and scale

actions.name: encodeY
actions.update: Same action replaces a compatible y field and scale

actions.name: encodeX2
actions.update: Same action replaces the compatible secondary x endpoint

actions.name: encodeColor
actions.update: Same action replaces compatible color grouping

actions.name: encodeStrokeDash
actions.update: Same action atomically replaces field, constant value, and scale binding

actions.name: encodeStroke
actions.update: Same action replaces the constant rule stroke

actions.name: encodeStrokeWidth
actions.update: Same action replaces constant rule width or field-driven line/rule width

actions.name: encodeSize
actions.update: Same action replaces field and scale binding

actions.name: encodeShape
actions.update: Same action replaces field and scale binding

actions.name: encodeOpacity
actions.update: Same action replaces the constant value

actions.name: encodeRadius
actions.update: Same action replaces the constant value

actions.name: encodeTheta
actions.update: Same action replaces the field and compatible Polar angle scale binding

actions.name: encodeR
actions.update: Same action replaces the field and compatible Polar radial scale binding

actions.name: removePointRadius
actions.update: Removes explicit point glyph radius and restores the theme default

actions.name: encodeXOffset
actions.update: Same action replaces compatible same-field scale and padding policy

actions.name: encodeYOffset
actions.update: Same action replaces compatible same-field scale and padding policy

actions.name: encodeY2
actions.update: Same action replaces a compatible secondary y endpoint

actions.name: encodeYRange
actions.update: Same action atomically replaces lower/upper fields

actions.name: encodeXRange
actions.update: Same action atomically replaces lower/upper fields

actions.name: encodeGroup
actions.update: Same action replaces compatible path grouping

actions.name: encodePathOrder
actions.update: Same action replaces the field and direction for one compatible path

actions.name: encodeParallelCoordinates
actions.update: Same action atomically replaces ordered dimensions, key, missing policy and dimension scales

actions.name: removePathOrder
actions.update: Removes explicit topology order and restores automatic independent-position ordering

actions.name: removeEncoding
actions.update: Removes one encoding and its owned companions, guides and concrete state

actions.name: encodeText
actions.update: Same action replaces field or constant text content

actions.name: encodeHistogram
actions.update: Same action will replace atomic bin/count encodings

actions.name: encodeDensity
actions.update: `editDensity` creates and rebinds an immutable revision

actions.name: editDensity
actions.update: Revises density source, field, grouping, statistics, and placement through immutable data

actions.name: encodeHorizon
actions.update: `editHorizon` creates and rebinds an immutable revision

actions.name: editHorizon
actions.update: Creates and rebinds an immutable Horizon revision

actions.name: encodeBarWidth
actions.update: Same action replaces the band fraction

actions.name: editRegression
actions.update: Revises regression data roles and statistics through immutable data and edits owned components

actions.name: editErrorBar
actions.update: Revises interval statistics and edits main-rule and owned-cap appearance

actions.name: editErrorBand
actions.update: Revises interval statistics, boundary state, and body appearance

actions.name: editErrorBandBoundary
actions.update: Creates or edits selected owned boundaries

actions.name: editBoxPlot
actions.update: Revises source/position roles through immutable summary siblings and edits owned components

actions.name: editGradientPlot
actions.update: Revises source/position roles through immutable profiles and edits owned components

actions.name: editXAxis
actions.update: Edits or removes selected existing x-axis components

actions.name: editYAxis
actions.update: Edits or removes selected existing y-axis components

actions.name: createGrid
actions.audit: Intentional; directional child actions own edits and removal

actions.name: editLegend
actions.update: Edits categorical, continuous, interval, size, and bounded stroke-width legend appearance

actions.name: editLegendLayout
actions.update: Delegates focused layout changes to editLegend

actions.name: editLegendLabels
actions.update: Delegates focused label changes to editLegend

actions.name: editLegendTitle
actions.update: Delegates focused title changes to editLegend

actions.name: editLegendSymbols
actions.update: Delegates focused symbol changes to editLegend

actions.name: editLegendBorder
actions.update: Delegates focused border changes to editLegend

actions.name: createGuides
actions.audit: Intentional; guide child actions own edits and removal

actions.name: removeLegend
actions.update: Removes every owned block or selected complete channel blocks

actions.name: removeTitle
actions.update: Removes the complete chart title resource

actions.name: createCoordinate
actions.update: Create another coordinate and rebind encodings

actions.name: createDerivedData
actions.update: Create a new derived dataset ID

actions.name: filterMarks
actions.update: Create selected-item data and rebind one mark

actions.name: editMarkSelection
actions.update: Replace a stored selector while preserving its ID and target

actions.name: removeMarkHighlight
actions.update: Remove highlight appearance while preserving selection intent

actions.name: removeMarkSelection
actions.update: Remove a stored selection and its dependent highlight

actions.name: editSemantic
actions.update: Assigns or removes one semantic property

actions.name: editGraphics
actions.update: Edits one graphical property or removes one named graphic subtree

actions.name: editCompositionLayout
actions.update: Edits concat layout or facet columns/layout

actions.name: editFacetScales
actions.update: Rederives facet children under edited scale policies

actions.name: editFacetGuides
actions.update: Rederives facet children and edits guide ownership

actions.name: createScatterPlot
actions.update: Existing point, encoding, scale and guide actions

actions.name: createLinePlot
actions.update: Existing line, encoding, scale and guide actions

actions.name: createBarPlot
actions.update: Existing bar, encoding, scale and guide actions

actions.name: createHistogram
actions.update: Existing histogram, color, scale and guide actions

actions.name: createHeatmap
actions.update: Existing rect, position, color, scale and guide actions

actions.name: createParallelCoordinates
actions.update: Existing line, Parallel encoding, scale, appearance and guide actions
